title: Odontochilus saprophyticus
taxonomy: Odontochilus saprophyticus is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Odontochilus, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. This plant is native to China and is known for its unique characteristics and growth habits. Odontochilus saprophyticus is a saprophytic orchid, meaning it obtains its nutrients by breaking down organic matter rather than through photosynthesis. Further classification includes it being placed in the tribe Orchideae within the subfamily Orchidoideae.
